steps.title: Find the contrast between realist and romantic styles
steps.content: The passage says the realist painting emphasizes accuracy in showing ordinary workers, while the romantic style instead highlights idealized traits through staged settings and flawless skin.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Rejected fits because the realist style opposes the romantic conventions described. Imitated, extended, and epitomized each suggest agreement or continuation, which contradicts the clear opposition between the two styles. That matches choice A — A is correct.
